title: dactylorhiza majalis var. macrantha
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis var. macrantha, also known as the large-flowered marsh orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, primarily for its expectorant properties, which help in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza majalis var. macrantha are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Dactylorhiza majalis var. macrantha can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
